status.resourcesTitle: CPU and RAM used by VOKARI (all child processes)

language.label: App language
language.hint: Changes the interface and the language of generated text (briefing, recap, notes).

settings.resetMsg: Behavior preferences return to their default values. Folders, API key and models are not touched.
settings.removeKeyMsg: The Claude key will be deleted from the keyring. You can re-enter it whenever you want.
settings.heading: Settings
settings.brainSub: Who organizes the transcript into the briefing. Only the text is sent.
settings.keyHelp: Required for the Claude API. Stored in the system keyring, never on disk.
settings.ollamaDown: installed but stopped — start it from the AI Models screen
settings.ollamaNotInstalled: not installed — install it from the AI Models screen
settings.cpuTempSub: LibreHardwareMonitor exposes the hardware sensors via WMI. It requires a UAC confirmation on first start; subsequent reads don't require admin.
settings.lhmActive: Active — temperature visible in the status bar
settings.msixPre: In the Microsoft Store version download
settings.msixPost: and run it: VOKARI will read its sensors.
settings.outputSub: Where briefings and notes end up.
settings.liveModelHelp: tiny = almost instant but imprecise · base = good compromise (default) · small = more accurate, ~3–5 s delay
settings.privacyFooter: The audio never leaves the device. No mandatory account: only the text is sent to the chosen AI.
settings.userContextHint: Describe your domain, role and recurring terms: the AI will use them to better understand your sessions and transcribe technical terms correctly. Optional.
settings.userContextPlaceholder: e.g. B2B food warehouse: lots, traceability, HACCP, DDT…

home.title: Record. Transcribe. Think better.
home.subtitlePost: — transcribed 100% on your device, no cloud.
home.meetingHintRest: = multiple people: the analysis looks for decisions and owners
home.contextHint: (optional — helps the AI grasp the purpose)
home.contextPlaceholder: e.g. Decide whether to build the landing page
home.dropTitle: Drag or click to import an audio file

banner.configure: Set up VOKARI to get started.
banner.needModel: Download a Whisper model to transcribe.
banner.needKey: Set your Claude API key (or switch to Ollama in Settings).

home.copyBriefing: Copy the briefing for your AI
home.copyBriefingTitle: Copy the briefing to the clipboard: paste it into ChatGPT, Claude or another AI

onb.title: Ready for your first briefing
onb.lead: You haven't recorded anything yet. Three steps and you'll have your first AI-ready document.
onb.step1dd: Solo or meeting; microphone, system audio or both. The type guides what the analysis looks for.
onb.step2ddPost: . You can also import an existing audio file.
onb.step3dd: VOKARI transcribes locally and structures decisions, open questions and the full transcript.
onb.assure: Everything stays on your PC — the audio never leaves your device.

errorScreen.copyUnavailable: Copy not available in this context
errorScreen.heading: Something went wrong
errorScreen.lead: The operation failed. The technical detail is below: you can retry, open settings or go back without losing anything.

interview.title: A couple of questions for a better briefing.
interview.leadBold: or answer in your own words
interview.progAnswerAny: · answer as many as you like
interview.fromAudioTitle: question prompted by a detail in the recording
interview.answerPlaceholder: Or answer in your own words…
interview.note: Never blocking — you can always regenerate later.
interview.contextPlaceholder: Something the AI didn't ask, a correction, background you know…
interview.noQuestionsLead: The analysis found no gaps. You can add context and generate, or generate as is.

transcriptReview.title: Review the transcript
transcriptReview.lead: Fix any recognition errors (names, homophones) before proceeding — clean text gives a better briefing.
transcriptReview.note: Never blocking — text goes to the AI only after you proceed.
transcriptReview.cancelConfirmMsg: The transcript will be discarded and cannot be recovered.

live.ctxLblPost: helps the AI grasp the purpose
live.ctxPlaceholder: e.g. stock, shifts and M2 yield
live.laneSysWarn: no signal — check the system audio
live.previewSub: live draft · the final transcription happens when recording ends
live.previewEmpty: Listening… text will appear in a few seconds.
live.footPrivacy: the audio never leaves the device
live.discardMsg: The audio recorded so far will be lost and cannot be recovered.

proc.rot0: The audio never leaves your PC — only the transcribed text goes out.
proc.rot1: Transcription runs locally with faster-whisper, on your CPU.
proc.rot2: The analysis extracts decisions, open questions and the full transcript.
proc.rot3: With Ollama not even the text leaves the device — all local.
proc.rot4: The final briefing is optimized to feed it to another LLM.
proc.rot5: A long recording may take a few minutes: that's normal.
proc.fixedQueued: Finalizing the recording… (normalizing and preparing the audio)
proc.fixedLoading: Loading the Whisper model onto the device… the first run may take ~20 seconds
proc.fixedAnalyzing: The AI is organizing the transcript into the briefing… on a local model it may take 1–2 minutes
proc.phaseQueued: Preparing the audio — normalizing and converting the recording
proc.phaseLoading: Loading the Whisper model onto your device…
proc.phaseTranscribe: Transcription in progress — the Whisper model runs on your CPU
proc.phaseAnalyze: AI Analysis — organizing the transcript into a briefing
proc.fitTitleWide: Transcript large for the chosen model
proc.gateExplainSummarize: The recording is long: before analysis it will be summarized in parts, losing some detail.
proc.gateExplainOver: The recording is too long even when summarized: the analysis will lose a lot of detail.
proc.gateGuide: For maximum fidelity, pick a model with a wider context in Settings, or split the recording into shorter parts. The transcription stays cached, so re-processing is fast.

art.copyTitle: Copy the content of the current tab
art.toClarifyTitle: Jump to the open questions left unanswered
art.obsEmptyDesc: Export it to your vault as an atomic note with frontmatter and wikilinks, ready for your second brain.
art.ctaTitle: Copy briefing.md to the clipboard: paste it into ChatGPT, Claude or another AI
art.ctaCopy: Copy the briefing for your AI
art.expBriefing: Document optimized to be pasted into another AI as context: sections, decisions, open questions and the full transcript.
art.pdfTitle: Creates a PDF of the recap and asks where to save it
art.expRecap: Prose version, meant to be read by a person. Exportable to PDF to share or archive it.
art.vaultTitle: Writes the note to the Obsidian vault configured in Settings
art.expVault: Atomic note for Obsidian with frontmatter and wikilinks: feeds your "second brain" by linking concepts across sessions.
art.reexportTitle: Regenerate briefing, recap and Obsidian notes from the saved analysis, using the current vault and folder (no re-transcription or AI)

sess.deleteManyMsg: The selected sessions will be removed from the library. This action cannot be undone.
sess.heading: Sessions
sess.subtitle: {{count}} recordings · all transcribed and stored locally.
sess.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, word in the text, date…
sess.emptySearchDesc: Try another word from the title or the text, or clear the search.
sess.emptyDesc: Your transcribed recordings appear here. Import an audio file or record from Home.

models.ramWarnTitle: Requires ~{{min}} GB of RAM · you have {{total}} GB
models.ollamaStartFailCheck: Ollama didn't start. Check the installation.
models.heading: AI Models
models.orgSub: Who turns the transcript into a briefing. Only the text is sent.
models.whisperSub: Runs 100% on your device. Download models on demand; the default balances speed and quality.
models.bigFileNote: Large file · one time only, may take a few minutes
models.noteB: models are English-only and therefore excluded: Vokari is
models.ollamaSubB: are indicative on CPU; use them (along with size, parameters and context) to choose the right model. Browse the full catalog at
models.ollamaDownloading: Downloading Ollama… {{pct}}% (large file, one time only)
models.ollamaRunningRest: — VOKARI starts it by itself every time it opens.
models.ollamaNotInstA: Ollama is not installed. VOKARI can
models.ollamaCanInstRest: — no administrator, everything in the app's data folder.
models.ollamaManualA: Ollama is not installed. Install it from
models.ollamaManualC: — and restart VOKARI: VOKARI will start and use it locally.

onboarding.heroP1d: — from a meeting, a brainstorm or a voice note.
onboarding.heroP2b: : the audio never leaves it. Only the transcribed text goes to the AI model you choose. It takes three steps.
onboarding.brainSub: Who organizes the transcript into the briefing. Only the text is sent.
onboarding.claudeSub: Best quality · requires a paid key
onboarding.localSub: Free and offline · requires installing Ollama
onboarding.ollamaInstalled: Ollama installed — VOKARI starts it itself
onboarding.ollamaCanInstall: VOKARI can download and configure it itself (no administrator).
onboarding.transcribeSub: VOKARI transcribes locally with Whisper. You download it once; then it works offline.
onboarding.transcribeNote: Large file · one time only, may take a few minutes. It continues even if you change step.
onboarding.readySub: Check the configuration. You can always review it in Settings and AI Models.
onboarding.readyNote: You can start anyway: VOKARI will remind you what's missing with a notice on the Home.
onboarding.privacyFooter: The audio never leaves the device. Only the transcribed text goes to the chosen AI.
